zh.of Tamworth Castle, Tamworth, Staffordsh: 英國英格蘭斯塔福爾塔沃斯
zh.Groby, Leicestershire, England: 英國萊希斯特斯爾格洛比
zh.Chillesmore, Warwickshire, England: 英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Freville於大約1398年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾塔沃斯時，她的父親Sir Baldwin Freville III32歲，母親Maud Scrope25歲。她於大約1437年與Sir Thomas de Ferrers結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1468年8月22日在英國萊希斯特斯爾格洛比享年71歲，埋葬在英國斯塔福爾塔沃斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Freville于大约1398年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾塔沃斯时，她的父亲Sir Baldwin Freville III32岁，母亲Maud Scrope25岁。她于大约1437年与Sir Thomas de Ferrers结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1468年8月22日在英国萊希斯特斯爾格洛比享年71岁，埋葬在英国斯塔福爾塔沃斯。

nameMeanings.name: Freville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French (Préville): habitational name from (La) Préville, the name of several places in various parts of France.

variants.name: Previl
meanings: alternatively, perhaps a shortened form of French Préville (see Preville ).
ornamental name composed of French pré ‘meadow’ and a shortened form of ville ‘settlement’ (see Vil ).

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Freville was born about 1398, in Tamworth, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Baldwin Freville III, was 32 and her mother, Maud Scrope, was 25. She married Sir Thomas de Ferrers about 1437. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 22 August 1468, in Groby, Leicestershire, England, at the age of 71, and was buried in Tamworth, Staffordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Freville est née environ 1398, à Tamworth, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Baldwin Freville III, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Maud Scrope, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas de Ferrers environ 1437. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 22 août 1468, à Groby, Leicestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterrée à Tamworth, Staffordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Freville um 1398 in Tamworth, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Baldwin Freville III 32 und ihre Mutter Maud Scrope 25. Sie hat um 1437 Sir Thomas de Ferrers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 22. August 1468 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Groby, Leicestershire, England und wurde in Tamworth, Staffordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Freville è nata il circa 1398 nel Tamworth, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Baldwin Freville III, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Maud Scrope, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas de Ferrers circa 1437. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 22 agosto 1468, nel Groby, Leicestershire, England, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolta a Tamworth, Staffordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Frevilleが約1398年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアタムウオルスで生まれた時，父Sir Baldwin Freville IIIは32歳，母Maud Scropeは25歳であった。約1437年にSir Thomas de Ferrersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1468年8月22日にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアグロビーで71歳で死去し，イギリススタフォードシュアイアタムウオルスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Freville(이)가 대략 1398년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 타워스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Baldwin Freville III(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud Scrope(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 대략 1437년 Sir Thomas de Ferrers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1468년 8월 22일 영국 레이스스터실르 그로비에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스태퍼드실르 타워스에 묻혔다.

mn.of Tamworth Castle, Tamworth, Staffordsh: Tamworth, Stæffordscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Freville nasceu aproximadamente 1398, em Tamworth, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Baldwin Freville III, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Maud Scrope, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas de Ferrers aproximadamente 1437. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 22 de agosto de 1468, em Groby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, com 71 anos, e foi sepultada em Tamworth, Staffordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Freville родилась около 1398 г. в местности тамворт, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Baldwin Freville III было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Maud Scrope, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas de Ferrers около 1437 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 22 августа 1468 г. в местности гроби, лисестиршир, Англия в возрасте 71 год и была похоронена в местности тамворт, стаффордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Freville nació aproximadamente 1398, en Tamworth, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Baldwin Freville III, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Maud Scrope, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Sir Thomas de Ferrers aproximadamente 1437. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 22 de agosto de 1468, en Groby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultada en Tamworth, Staffordshire, Inglaterra.
